item.title: Kristen Stewart interviewed and saying 'The idea of selfhood, the idea of diaristic writing by women being criticized for being selfish and narcissistic—it's like, oh sorry I was being selfish. I wanted a self.'
item.description: Kristen Stewart interviewed and saying 'The idea of selfhood, the idea of diaristic writing by women being criticized for being selfish and narcissistic—it's like, oh sorry I was being selfish. I wanted a self.'

item.title: A black baby t-shirt that says 'DTF: Down to Forgive' posted by the Tumblr account 'shopping4images'
item.description: A black baby t-shirt that says 'DTF: Down to Forgive' posted by the Tumblr account 'shopping4images'

item.title: Jeopardy question: Trade name Narcan, it's available over the counter & carrying a little of it as a nasal spray can save the life of someone overdosing
item.description: Jeopardy question: Trade name Narcan, it's available over the counter & carrying a little of it as a nasal spray can save the life of someone overdosing

item.title: It's like her sadness is... it's such an overwhelming part of her.
